creator: freebsd@daemon.de
text:
Howdy,

I have installed the latest ntopng package (version 4.0.d20200710,1) and am unable to configure InfluxDB support. See ntopng#4848 (linked above). Upstream says the version is too old and not supported anymore.

It would be cool of the port is being updated to 4.2.


Thanks in advance,
Tom
